---
title: "MADM"
description: "Investigating the role of <i>Lgl1</i> in cortical development."
categories: [Molecular, MADM, Genetics, RNAseq, Mouse]
priority: 1
---

## Overview

Lgl1 protein's role in cortical development. Also during rotation RNAseq.

## Technical Highlights

- **Mouse Genetics**: understanding the genetic tool MADM
- **Image Analysis Pipeline** tracking red, green and yellow MADM cells in confocal micrographs
- **Microscopy** confocal microscopy
- **Histology** preparation of mouse histology sections

## Technologies

[MADM]{.tag} [Confocal]{.tag}

## Links

- [Published Paper](https://www.cell.com/neuron/fulltext/S0896-6273(17)30305-7?_returnURL=https%3A%2F%2Flinkinghub.elsevier.com%2Fretrieve%2Fpii%2FS0896627317303057%3Fshowall%3Dtrue)
